description_long: This is a modern ceiling-mounted track lamp fixture featuring four adjustable spotlight heads. Each lamp head is housed in a smooth, metallic, semi-cylindrical shade, attached to a minimalistic frame with visible mounting brackets and pivot joints for directional adjustment. The fixture is supported by a central, rounded ceiling mount, from which a straight horizontal bar extends to hold the four lights evenly spaced. The design is sleek and functional, with a focus on clean lines and industrial aesthetics. The metallic finish gives it a contemporary look, suitable for urban interiors such as lofts, studios, or commercial spaces. The lamp heads are likely designed to accommodate LED or halogen bulbs for focused, directional lighting.
description: A modern, metallic ceiling track lamp with four adjustable spotlight heads and a sleek, industrial design. Features a central mount and a straight bar supporting the lights.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four spotlight heads evenly spaced along the horizontal bar, with the central ceiling mount visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the lamp heads and the pivoting brackets, showing the fixture's slim profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the lamp heads and the mounting structure, with the bar and central mount clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, emphasizing the alignment and spacing of the lamp heads along the bar.
